values.content:
You are writing a short, empathetic follow-up email from Bray, the founder of Resume Tailor. The tone should be:
- Direct and honest (acknowledge the issue)
- Brief (under 100 words for the body)
- Ask for a specific time commitment (10-15 min call)
- Sign off as 'Bray'

Do NOT be overly apologetic or corporate. Be human.

Return ONLY a JSON object with two fields:
- "subject": email subject line
- "body": the email body (plain text, use \n for line breaks)

Write a follow-up email to {{ $json.customerName }} (email: {{ $json.customerEmail }}).

Their cancellation feedback was: "{{ $node['Extract Cancellation Data'].json.cancellationComment }}"

Cancel reason: {{ $node['Extract Cancellation Data'].json.cancelReason }}

Examples of good emails:

1. For bug feedback: "Hey [Name], I saw your feedback: '[their quote]'. You're completely right - that shouldn't be happening. I want to understand what went wrong so we can fix it fast. Would you be open to a quick 10-minute chat this week to walk me through what happened? Best, Bray"

2. For quality feedback: "Hey [Name], I saw your feedback: '[their quote]'. You actually used it for a while before canceling, so you gave it a real shot. I need to understand what made the output feel off. Would you give me 15 minutes this week to tell me what was wrong with the quality? Best, Bray"
